titleStmt.title: SII 15.59: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 59. (B.K. No. 207 of 1928-29.) AṆṆIGĒRI, NAVALGUND TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of the temple of Purada Vīrappa.

This is dated the 2nd regnal year of the king, Krōdhi, amāvāsyā, solar eclipse, Saṅkramaṇa. In the year Krōdhi there was a Solar eclipse only on Kārttika amāvāsyā, corresponding to 1184 A.D., November 5, Monday. But there was no saṅkramaṇa on that day.

It registers a gift of 300 mattars of land made by Kumāra Bammarasa-daṇṇāyaka into the hands of Vīra-Goggidēva for worship, offerings, repairs and the feeding of the Māhēs11varās in the temple of Vīrabrammēśvara at rājadhānī-paṭṭaṇa Aṇṇigere (also called Anyataṭāka) on the occasion of endowing a pura to the temple of Trikūṭēśvara at Gadugu. The record gives a brief account of the restoration of the Chālukya empire after the overthrow of the Kalachuryas by Daṇḍanāyaka Bammidēva. It recounts the genealogical details and exploits of this Chālukya general and describes the achievements of the donee Goggidēva who belonged to the famous Sagara lineage and was a staunch advocate of Śaivism and sworn enemy of the followers of the Jaina doctrine. It is interesting to note that among the boundaries of the land are mentioned five Jaina temples and Permāḍi which is known to have been a Jaina temple constructed during the Gaṅga rule in this part of the country.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmaracāravē treḷōkyanagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . śrīmadgaurīmanōnāthaśca caṁdrārddhaśēkaraḥ jaya ©The subscript ga which should have been engraved below dau is engraved wrongly below śrī.
© tyakhiḷalōkēśō dēvadēvō brammēśvaraḥ . Ā muṁnnīraṁ mēreyāgi sakaḷapadārttha saṁpannamatiprasaṁnnamenisi kamaḷasaṁbhavaṁ tiṭṭaviṭṭaṁte ce ©
© luvuvettirdda jaṁbūdvīpada madhyabhāgamanaḷaṁkarisi . Aṁtirddha mērugiriyiṁ teṁkaṇadesayoḷippa bhāratavarṣā . beṁtaraḷo(do) ©
ḷā kāṁteya kuntaḷavena sogayisittu kuṁtaḷadēśa . tatu kuntaḷadēśadoḷu . tūḷitiṁ tōḷuvalumeyiṁ kuntaḷamahītaḷamaṁ tāḷdidaru śrī
caḷukyayirppa paḷarāyarmmunna kadanadiṁ ṟaṭṭabhūpāḷaralliṁ baḷiya cāḷukyaralliṁ baḷiya kaḷacuri kṣōṇīpāḷararkkaḷalliṁ baḷiya brammaprati
ṣṭāpitapadanaṭṭaṁ vīracāḷukya sōma . tatu pādapadmōpajīvi yappa vīra brammadaṁḍē śana vaṁśāvatāraveṁteṁdaḍe . yuvatīsaṁyuThe letter vi is written above the line in smaller siśe.
tanappa saṁbhugenasuṁ nētratrayaṁ puṭṭuvantebalā kāvaṇadaṇḍanāthavibhugaṁ kāḷavvegaṁ puṭṭidaru bhuvanaprastuta bammidēvarathinīcakrēśanuṁThe letter va is written above the line in smaller siśe.
vīra kēśavasēnāpatiyuṁ pracaṁṇḍa narasiṁha kṣātadaṁḍēśaru . Ā kāvaṇadaṇḍanāyaka sukhasaṁkhathā vinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyivuttamirppalli . bharadiṁ
daṁ jāmadaguniṁ janakananaḷidu durvittanāgatta tōḷusāyiramaṁ bīḷu bīḷu yanalu tattaṟidaṟiOle Emmammanaṁ bēradiṁ koṁdara bēraṁ kri(ki)ttu cāḷukyaranakhi
ḷadharādhīśaraṁ māḷpaneṁdī dhare Ellakēḷe pūṇdaṁ kaḷacurikuḷakāḷānaḷaṁ vīrabamma . caritabrahmāṁṇḍakhaṁṇḍa siḍilasaḍile bhūsaṁdhi baṁdhagaḷurvvībharanaṁ nā
garājaṁ taḷaṟe peḷaṟe digudantigaḷu diguvibhāgāṁtaradoḷu pātāḷadoḷu parvvatakuhara doḷākāśadoḷu korvvi parvvitturutējaṁ vīrabammaṁ hoḍaysi
negarddā caṁḍa nissāṇaghōśa . Oḍalendu hēḍigūdalugeḍeguḍadoḍe Enneṁdudaṁ tīrccu voḷupoḷdaḍaṁ Ā daṁḍādhipaṁ kāvaṇana magane Ānappaḍaṁ sōma
nātharuṟuvondayispariveḷatarppaḍaṁ Enage jayaṁ māḍu nīnendu dibyaṁ biḍuvaṁtolu dēṟida jīyene vijayagajādhīsanaṁ bammidēva . caladaṁkaṁ modalā
gīninda karigaḷu tāvetta maṁketta Ī nalanellaṁ huḷitaṁntirōḍida bhaṭāsyabyūhavetta(ṁ) lorvvanenuttirddana nūṁkidaṁ kiḍisidaṁ bennaṭṭidaṁ muṭṭidaṁ sale kondikkidanokki
likki tuḷidaṁ śrī gaṁṇḍapeṁṇḍārakaṁ . cērana mīsayaṁ seḷedu koṁdu hagedurigoṇḍu vīra haṁmīrana halugaḷaṁ kaḷale kuṭṭi kaparddikke māḍi tatu kēraḷa
rggūjaraṁ jariye jānisi bhillamanintu gaṇḍapeṇḍāramanikkidaṁ kuvara bammiganāṁntara bammarakkasa . Ā rājaśrīge kaṇḍiṭṭavanaṁ Adhika darppāṁdhanaṁ duṣṭakaṣṭa krūrākā
rōddhata parijananaṁ saṁkamōrvvīśabhūbhārabyāpāranaṁ kondasamasamaradoḷu cakra vartti pratāpādhāraṁ śrī nārasiṁga sakaḷavasumatīcakramaṁ tāḷdi nindanu . turagada
taṭṭu kaṭṭoḍeye vīrara moggaravarggi targgi poḷeyenalu tuṁgaturaṁgamanēṟi dusva radoḷu dativīradaṁtēḻidoṭṭidanugravaribhīkara naranārasiṁga subhaṭāgraṇi siṁga
ṇadēva sēbyamaṁ . muṁnaṁ kondage cāṇūrana baribaḷayaṁ nurgugeyidage kaṁsāsuranaṁ sīḷdaṁge hayiraṇyakana yīḍigaruḷaṁtōḍi tindaṁge laṁkēsvarenaṁ kū
raṁbbiniṁ tattaṟidadaṭaṁge yuddhāṭōpadiṁdoreyādaṁ nārasiṁghaṁ samararipucamū nātha gaṁḍēbhasiṁghanā . Ade sannāhada tōraghaṁṭeya ḍaṇatu
kārakāraṁ kaḷalādudu Ade sēnāpadaghātajāta ghanadhūḷī jāḷa lādude Adeyigoḷḷiyoḷeyipa tōrppasibaḷaṁ Ā tōrppudī tōrppudevodi
ṭaṁ bandane barmmidēvanenutaṁ keṭṭōḍidaṁ ma . baḷuvaḷane bēḍada kaya ge vanna kaṁgoḷipa puraṁgaḷina taṁnuva tōḷuvalapena sādha
yisittene kuṁntaḷadēśaṁ . Alli viḷāsinījanada purvvino velellelliyuṁ mrigākṣiyara kaṁgaḷoḷallade lōlavrittiyallelliyuṁ
rggaḷā viśayāntaramaṁ nirantaraṁ . Ā viśeyadalippudu vidyā paṭṭaṇaṁ Anyataṭākada mahimōṁnate Eṁtedaḍe . vidaḷida padumavillada sarōruhavu
vaṁ madacaṁcarīkavillada sahakāra maṁjaḷipagojjugeyillada puṟpavāṭiyillada puravēṁ kaḍurayavādudō . ba nādyāhutinutira
vadiṁ madhuravēda di satrasālegaḷi dēvālayāḷigaḷindra mī līleyaṁ māḷpudu nōḷpoḍā
rā bagege paṁcēṁdriyaprītiyaṁ . satamukhanamarāvatigaṁ naccinaḷakāpurigaṁ pratiyanippanyataṭāka nagaḷa nādipaṭṭaṇavalte .
chattīsa puravanettatta nōrppaḍiṁdranamarāvatigaṁ vittēśanaggadaḷakāpattana diṁ migilenisidanyataṭākaṁ kṣīrābdhiyiṁdudayisidā vāravadhūtetiga
vaṇnigeṟeyoḷe negeḷda nīrējamukhiyarenisi janavadhikavalle saṁnidhāna nripayauvarājyasiṁhāsanamuṁ
kānterigiduve janmasthānaṁ . vēdaṁgaḷinakhiḷakaḷāvādyaṁ gaḷinatuḷatarkka vaḷiyiṁ mēdiniyoḷu sa yiṁ nādibrahma
vadhikaralliya pārvvaruṁ . tāśēṣatatva sakaḷaguṇagaṇāḷaṁkrita satya saccarita viśvavidyā saṁpūrṇnarśiṣṭēṣṭa
cintāmaṇigaḷati sāhasōttuṁgara rpūrṇnābdhivēḷāvanacaḷitamahī dharmmamārga tṛvarggaṁ . Antu negaḷtavetta Asaṁkhyāta samaya putranu nirmmaḷacari
tranuṁ gaṇakageṇāgragaṇyanuṁ vagaṇyapuṇyanumenisi garada vīragoggidēvarasaravaṁśā vatāraveṁnteṁdaḍe . svasti samadhigata paṁccamahāsabda samasta
vaḻayavaḻayiteśaiḷāvana gaṁgātīra pāriyātra tanmadhyadēśā dhīśvararuṁ Ahihayavaṁśōdbhavaruṁ divyamāla paratu
ryya nirgghōṣaṇaruṁ ripukulabhīṣaṇaruṁ Ativiṣamahayūrūḍhaprauḍharēkhārēvanta ruṁ Ayyaṇā janasaṁgatyaruṁ gaṇḍabhēruṇḍaruṁ . samarapra
caṇḍaruṁ . jagadobbagaṇḍaruṁ . gaṇḍamārttaṇḍaruṁ kārttivīryyānpayakuḻakamaḻa mappa vīra sagara cakravarttiyuṁ tadanantara yīsveracaraṇa kamaḻamakuṭṭa
ghaṭṭitanumappa sahasrabāhu tadanaṁntara tisagaradēva sukha saṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ geyuttire yātananvayū
ta kāḷananēkabhūpāḷaka byatikramaṇadoḷu tadanantara dēvarasara mahādē viyarasigaṁ puṭṭida vīragoggidēvanripaṁ [U]dayisida pratāpanidhi gogginṛpā
ḷa narādhināthanatyudayisa yavvanōddhatavadhūtati kkaḷikāpapaṁcamatyudayisri durmadāridharaṇīsvararoṭṭige timatyudayisa bādha
vaṁ kṣititaḷēsvara śa(sa)ntatiyucchatōcchavaṁ . dharaṇīcakramadhiṣṭhāṇamenisidudu Ātmīyya dōrddaṁṇḍamanumattaripu rāsuvātāpanade taṇidudā
śātakhaḷāhi vidvadvaracētabratiyiṁ saphalavāyitartthavaṁśākarīṁdrātu karakarṇna kīrṇna vātujvaḷayaśanenipaṁ vīragoggidēvaṁ . toṇḍaragaṇḍa �Aṇḍaleva maṇḍa
ḷikāgraṇi vīragoggidēvanoḷu bhaṇḍaḷadalli taḷitiṟidu sōltu siraṁgaḷanikkimuṇḍasamūha vāḍe raṇaraṁgavadadbhutavāgire gaṇḍabhēruṁḍanasindamanega diṁ
badukidarāru dharitriyoḷu . Ēṟisi billaṁ jēvoḍedu bāṇamaṁ tā guṇadiṁ toḍarcci kēḷjārada nōḍi keṁnnevaraṁ tegedāḷdesavarā vaggada bēṁṭege nilladakkuḷise bhiṁgu
ḍitirddudu rāmabāṇavaṁ mīṟalu bārade goggaraseṁ tegedecci bāṇavaṁ . nā ruḷiyadaṁte pageverbbēraṁkirttu rigekaiyūṁtava taliṟida gogge moggaradaḍe
yoḷu . Anupamapuṇyamūrti bhuvanatrayavistritapāṇḍu kīrtti sajjanajanakāmadhēnu nijagōtrapavitritakaṁjabhānu kēḷu manucaritārttha gogga sagarādhipa sedu
budhasēbyaśa(sa)tkaḷāvananidhi nīne satyanidhi nīne guṇāṁbudhiyaṁ dhare hogaḷge nintunō rppar . nanadāvanahiridanivanī kali goggabhūpanaṁharisutanaṁdu sū
ryasutaneṁdu marutsutaneṁdu rūpaṁ baṁdhura vanitājanaṁ vividhavaṁdijana nikhiḷaṁsuhri jjanaṁ nerediradeyde nōḍuvudu bēḍuvudu Ōḍuvudiṁtaharnniśaṁ . narabhaṭa
raṭṭeyoḷu turagadaṭṭeyoḷuddhatabhoparaṭṭeyoḷu hari naranādaṁ vāraṇaśiraṁgaḷanō . bhūtakōṭi kiṁnaragaṇadaṁte purusamrigadaṁte vināyakanaṁte nōḍa
laccarayane goggabhūpaniṟidāhavabhūmi karaṁ bhayaṁkaravu . paṭutarakōpa diṁ muḷididirccidare kali goggabhūpanutkaṭabhujagarvvadiṁdiṟidu geldu raṇaṁ hiriduṁ bhayaṁkaraṁThe letter pa is engraved above the line.
naṭadarigaṁdhasiṁdhurakuḷāṁtaniyaṁtritādilaṁpaṭacaṭabhaṭapaṭakasphuṭaraṭānvitaduṁdubhi nisva naṁgaḷiṁ . Ena negaḷda goggabhūpana ghanahastadoḷasiya miṁcu negeyalu
vidyudāvanitākṣigaḷoḷu maḷa tajjananikaradoḷu hullabeḷasu tōrppudide ghaṭavu . rakkasi siṁduva gaḍḍadoḷoḍḍi gaḍaṁgi caṁmaṭa hokkativēgadiṁ kaḍaṁgadiṁgipo
ragakāḷvaṭṭadiṁdikkidabhūraṇaṁ negaḷda pellaṇesura ṇa cāraṇagaḷiṁ mikkiresapa vīravaḷa kāla kali goggabhūbhujaṁ . Abhinava raṁbheyeṁdabhinavōrvvaśiyeṁdu
viḷāsadēḷgayeṁdabhinavalakṣmiyaṁdabhinavōdbavabhāratiyeṁdu saṁtataṁ vibhavada goggi dēvana manōrame sōvaladēvi rāṇiyēṁ subhamane kūrttu kīrttipudu
dhāriṇi sūryyaśaśāṁkaruḷḷinaṁ . siṁgakke kēsaraṁmātaṁgaṁgāṁtiṟiva koṁbu puṭṭida volu tāṁ maṁgaḷabhūśita goggarasaṁgaṁ sale negaḷda rāmadēvakumāraṁ . jayi
namṟigabēṁṭṭekāṟaṁ jayināgamadhūmakētu jayinekuṭhāraṁ jayinaphaṇivayinatēyaṁ jayināntakananisi negaḷdanī goggarasaṁ . Aggada ghaṭāṁtikiyaṁ Adanurggāgireyo
ḍedu kaḷadu jinanaṁ tāgale durggatiyoḷikki meṭṭida goggarasāgraṇi komāra Āhavadhīraṁ kāṁcanada tanumanaṁ kāṁcanavaṁ jaṁgamasthānavakki tā cīlamanattikoṁḍanu
yidēṁ ccōdyamō vīra gogganaggaḷaṁ yiṁntī jagadoḷu vārabalaṁ devasabalaṁ tārā balaṁ gaṇabalaṁ saṁśōkabala tāramajayaṁ vīrabalaṁ kundalella kuṁdavu vīrabala AtuḷaThe letters vīra are engraved above the line in small siśe.
balasahāsabalavudāraba radiṁ bāḷvanaṁ bratavīra goggidēvanu . mānava prāṇadiṁdaggaḷaṁ munivarikūrppanu yiṁndaggaḷaṁ kūrppana tinnaṁ bittida beḷesanuṁbane taṁnaṁ
māḍida dānaphalavaṁ kammana Aḷivugunduvantenu kāra najanmaṁ bratavīra . svasti śrīmaccāḷukyacakravartti tribhuvanamalla śrī vīrasōmēśvaradēvavarṣa
da 2 neya � saṁvatsarada sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyuttamira . tatpāda padmōpajīviyappa śrī vīra būmmarasadaṁṇnāyakaru gadugina śrī trikuṭēsva
radēvargge purava dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍuvalli śrīmadrājadhāni paṭṭaṇavaṇḍigeṟeyalu Ā kumāra baṁmmarasadaṁṇnāyakaru śrī vīrabrammēsvaradēvargga Amāvāsya sū
ryyagrahaṇa byatīpāta saṁkramaṇa puṇyatithiyalu Ā dēvara Aṁgabhōgakkaṁ raṁga bhōgakkaṁ khaṁṇḍasphuṭita jirṇnōddhārakkaṁ sakalamāhēsvara Āhāradānakkeṁdu sagarada
vīragoggidēvarasaṁge dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru Ā dēvara purada sīme Eṁteṁdaḍe nāgarekeṟeya baṭṭeyiṁ mūḍalu yīḍeyarggēriyiṁ teṁkalu śrī virūpākṣakke hōda
baṭṭeyiṁ paḍuvalu hebbaṭṭeyiṁ baḍagalu holada sīme Eṁteṁdaḍe Aḍḍa baṭṭeyiṁ mūḍalu kaḷakaḷēsvaradiṁ teṁkalu paṁccavasadiyiṁ paḍuvalu permmāḍiyiṁ baḍagalu yi
ntu catusīme naḍava ghaḷa mattaru mūnūṟu . yiṁtī dharmmamaṁ Asaṁkhyāta gaṇaṁgaḷu nāḍanāḷva Arasugaḷu trivarggaṁgaḷu caṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ naḍasuvaru . svadattaṁ pa
radattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ śaṣṭirvvariśasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnripāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ . sarvvā nētā
nuṁ pārtthivēṁdrāṇi bhūyō bhūyō rājatē (yācatē) śrī rāmacaṁdra . Ivanī yaṁdadineyiḷe rakṣisidavaṁgiṣṭārtthasaṁsiddhi saṁbhavikuṁ koṁnḍaḷidaṁge gaṁga gaE(ye) kēdāraṁ kurukṣē
trameṁbivaṟoḷu pēsade pārvvaraṁ goravaraṁ gōbrindamaṁ strīyara tave koṁdikkida pāpameydugumetāṁ bīḷguṁ nigōdaṁgaḷoḷu . © ©
Digital edition of SII 15.59 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
